title: She Hates Me
why_this_song: She Hates Me by Puddle of Mudd (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "She fucking hates me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Trust, she fucking hates me"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "She fucking hates me"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Never thought I'd be the one who'd slip"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I tried too hard, and she tore my feelings like I had none"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hates" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hates" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "trust" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "trust" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Met a girl, thought she was grand
She was queen for about an hour

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Fell in love, found out first hand
Never thought I'd be the one who'd slip
Now it's over, and I'm glad

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "She Hates Me" was released in 2001. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "She Hates Me" foi lançada em 2001. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "She Hates Me" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "She Hates Me" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
